questions.question: Explain the key differences between the chalk and talk method and the PowerPoint presentation process, in the context of teaching linear algebra, including vector spaces. (8 marks)
questions.hint: Provide specific examples from vector spaces to illustrate your answer

questions.question: Describe the role of visual aids in the chalk and talk method, including PowerPoint presentations, in enhancing student understanding of vector spaces in linear algebra. (6 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits of using visual aids for students with different learning styles

questions.question: Evaluate the effectiveness of using PowerPoint presentations in teaching linear algebra, including vector spaces, using the chalk and talk method. Provide examples of how to improve the presentation process. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Consider factors such as audience engagement, clarity, and student feedback
